---
title: "Contact"
description: "Email and institutional affiliation."
---

## Email

[fikru.rizal@monash.edu](mailto:fikru.rizal@monash.edu)

## Affiliation

Health Economics Group  
School of Public Health and Preventive Medicine  
Monash University

Level 4, 553 St Kilda Road  
Melbourne, VIC 3004  
Australia

## Links

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=x1Dg-P8AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/fikrurizal)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/muhammad-fikru-rizal-066a3081/)
- [X / Twitter](https://twitter.com/fikrurizal)
